measurement_caveat: WebSearch proxy is DIRECTIONAL ONLY; it cannot observe true ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity citations. Domain is 7 days post-rebrand (sayfeai.com); near-zero indexation expected. 0/N is not a regression signal.
sample_note: Reduced sample this run: 5 WebSearch-proxy searches -> 7 query_id records (the Colorado search covers colorado-ai-act-small-business + colorado-sb-26-189-admt; the assessment search covers ai-compliance-assessment + ai-risk-assessment-tool). Single-engine degraded mode + ~30s throttle + 8 prior days of identical directional results made a full 40-query sweep low-value on a still-unindexed domain. Priority-bucket coverage (compliance/assessment/partner) preserved.

results.notes: SB 26-189 (ADMT) repealed & replaced SB 24-205; signed 2026-05-14, effective 2027-01-01. Law-firm advisories own it. 40-or-fewer-employee deployer carve-out; AG rulemaking pending. This finding directly grounds today's realtime-voice SB-24-205 staleness fix.
Official bill-number query; same legal-advisory set. Our Colorado blog carries SB 26-189/ADMT aliases (shipped 2026-05-22) but isn't indexed/cited yet on a 7-day-old domain.

Article 50 transparency obligations fully enforceable Aug 2 2026; SME simplified pathways + sandboxes; applies by functional role (provider/deployer) regardless of company size. EU Digital Omnibus deadline-extension thread still live.

No single branded 'free assessment' owns it; trycomplianceiq.com NOT surfaced again. ispartnersllc.com (results <60s) and impactmaker.co (~8min, no signup, no card) now own the fast/free/no-signup promise -> bake that exact promise into /compliance-assessment when built. Open lane.
'Free, no signup, results in minutes' promise owned by TrustLayer Risk Matrix + Logicballs + IS Partners. Build that into /compliance-assessment H1+FAQ (pillar handoff).

Engine 2. 'AI governance as high-margin MSP service' framing dominates; compliance MSP services projected +21% in 2026. Sayfeai has zero MSP-reseller content -> strategy proposal, NOT a fabricable page edit. Nugget: TRAIGA (Texas Responsible AI Governance Act, effective 2026-01-01) cited -> relevant to Sayfeai's TX HQ.

Comparison-table pages win. Data privacy (Plus trains by default w/ only per-user opt-out; Business excludes training org-wide by contract, no toggle) is THE cited differentiator. Pricing consensus: Plus $20/mo; Business $25/mo or $20/mo annual, min 2 seats. Open-rec to add a data-privacy/admin-enforcement FAQ to /blog/chatgpt-business-vs-plus remains queued (not shipped this run to hold the 1-patch discipline).
